positive: A symmetrical, detailed celestial jungle motif centered within a circular frame, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora, intricate mystical geometric mandalas, and stylized celestial fauna like crescent moons and ethereal hummingbirds. The style should be neo-sacred geometry mixed with stained glass aesthetics and deep bioluminescence, emphasizing high contrast between deep indigo and vibrant turquoise/gold accents. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, solid silhouette elements, ideal for screen printing on apparel, highly detailed, vector art quality, UHD.
